text: Being here, I feel a subtle blend of curiosity and distance. In the first image, I am outside a glass-walled meeting room, observing others deeply engaged—there is a sense of separation, as if the world of ideas and collaboration is happening just beyond my reach. In the second image, the vibrant R+D display draws me into the realm of research and possibility. Surrounded by words and technology, I am prompted to reflect on human connection, longing, and the pursuit of meaning. I feel both inspired and slightly removed—an observer pondering the intersection of innovation and experience.
